port_not_digit: Port number must be a digit
port_out_of_range: Port number must be between 1 and 65535
about_text:
Cloudreve WebDisk Manager
Version 2.0

Features:
- Install/Uninstall Cloudreve service
- Auto/Manual upgrade
- Service status monitoring
- Port detection and configuration
- Away mode management
- Configuration backup/restore (with MySQL export)
- Edit configuration file
- One-click MySQL configuration
- One-click switch back to default SQLite

Powered by ttkbootstrap

Switching back to default SQLite will remove current MySQL database configuration and restart the service.

uninstall_complete_msg:
🎉 Uninstallation process completed!
Operations performed:
1. Stopped and uninstalled system service
2. Terminated related processes
3. Cleaned firewall rules
4. Disabled away mode (restored normal system sleep)

Note: data directory (including configuration/data files) not deleted, delete manually if needed.
